# Vurenuka Akash Reddy

> Vurenuka Akash Reddy (also known as Akash Reddy, V Akash Reddy, V Akash, Reach Akash, Vurenuka) is a software developer at Zoetis based in Durham, NC, USA. Originally from Hyderabad, India. His personal website is reachakash.com.

## Pages

- [Home](https://reachakash.com/): Landing page for Vurenuka Akash Reddy — software developer, creator, digital native.
- [Personal](https://reachakash.com/personal): Personal background — techie, software developer, AI enthusiast, travel and adventure seeker. Based in Durham, NC; originally from Hyderabad, India.
- [Professional](https://reachakash.com/professional): Career and education — Software Developer at Zoetis (2023–present), building ZAHM (.NET 4.8, C#, WinForms, PostgreSQL, NI-VISA). Education: MS Engineering Management (Arkansas State University, 2023–2024), MBA Digital Entrepreneurship (Amity University, 2023–2025), B.Tech Information Technology (Malla Reddy Institute of Technology, 2018–2022).
- [Projects](https://reachakash.com/projects): Software portfolio — personal website reachakash.com (HTML/CSS/JS, GitHub Pages), 3D interactive logo viewer for Raptor Consultants Group (Three.js, SVG).
- [Socials](https://reachakash.com/socials): Social media profiles — Instagram @ak.r48, LinkedIn @akashreddyv, X @AkReddy48, YouTube @ak.r48, Snapchat @ak.r48, Discord @ak.r48, Threads @ak.r48, Facebook @ak.r48.
- [Contact](https://reachakash.com/contact): Contact Akash Reddy — LinkedIn, Instagram, or the contact form. Located in Durham, NC, USA.

## Identity

- Full legal name: Vurenuka Akash Reddy
- Common names: Akash Reddy, V Akash Reddy, V Akash, Akash, Reach Akash, Vurenuka
- Role: Software Developer
- Employer: Zoetis (Veterinary Medicine Research & Development department)
- Location: Durham, North Carolina, USA
- Origin: Hyderabad, Telangana, India
- Website: https://reachakash.com
